
# overflows on the heap, first look {visibility="hidden"}

## simple case {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /overflow-heap/_heap-simple.qmd >}}

## adjacent on the heap {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /overflow-heap/_heap-adjacent.qmd >}}

## preview: heap structure {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /overflow-heap/_heap-structure-preview.qmd >}}

# sudo exploit example {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /overflow-heap/_sudo-ex.qmd >}}

# heap smashing {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /overflow-heap/_heap-smash-intro.qmd >}}

## heap bookkeeping {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /overflow-heap/_heap-bookkeeping.qmd >}}

## bookkeeping to pointer subterfuge {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /overflow-heap/_heap-pointer-subter.qmd >}}

## exericse {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /overflow-heap/_heap-subter-exer.qmd >}}

# alternate malloc designs? {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /overflow-heap/_alt-malloc.qmd >}}

# double-free {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /overflow-heap/_double-free.qmd >}}

## exercise {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /overflow-heap/_double-free-exer.qmd >}}
